opening_line: Most AI engineer job posts are lying to you.
MLOps engineers make thirty percent more than ML engineers at the same company.
Hiring managers aren't just looking for Python skills anymore.
Your resume is upside down and it's costing you interviews.
Eighty-seven percent of hiring managers say they can't find candidates with AI automation skills — but here's what they're not telling you.
Every AI engineer knows Python and Docker, but the ones making 300K plus know this stack.
The highest-paying tech jobs in 2025 all require the same three skills that used to be completely separate.
Four skills that can get you to $180K within two years — but most engineers are learning the wrong ones.
